title: Winterglide's Extra Animations [Cobblemon]
description: Resourcepack that changes the animations of different pokemons and also works as a Datapack for added shoulder mounts
body:
This Resource pack reworks the animations of the following cobblemon pokemons:

- Emolga
- Clodsire

If you put this ResourcePack in the datapack folder of your world you'll be able to put Emolga on your shoulder :)
